title: Implement deterministic map grid and chunk dirty queues
summary: Implement the M1 authoritative map grid, chunk metadata, terrain/walk/occupancy fields, local dirty queues, rebuild budgets and canonical hash/snapshot hooks.
acceptance: Map data uses contiguous numeric storage rather than per-cell object graphs
Terrain, occupancy, walk cost, region id, room id and per-cell/chunk version fields are authoritative in sim-core
Dirty queues are local, budgeted per tick and cannot grow in unchanged worlds
World hash and save snapshot include map state in stable order

history.details: Implemented deterministic typed-array map grid, stable map hash/snapshot hooks, map-grid tests, and map-dirty benchmark; required checks pass.

changes_requested: Medium: touched sim-core file fails root lint at packages/sim-core/src/map-grid-hash.ts:43 (@typescript-eslint/prefer-for-of). Task-required checks otherwise reproduced, but this will block the broader project lint/integration gate.
Addressed reviewer lint/performance finding; required checks and lint pass

verified: No blocking findings; prior map-grid-hash lint issue is resolved, root lint/typecheck/map-grid tests/taskctl validate/git diff check pass, and solo map-dirty benchmark remains OK versus baseline without reintroduced regression.

review.summary: No blocking findings; prior map-grid-hash lint issue is resolved, root lint/typecheck/map-grid tests/taskctl validate/git diff check pass, and solo map-dirty benchmark remains OK versus baseline without reintroduced regression.
